title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Toki, Unknown person #10, Whitebeard, Kozuki Retainers, Unknown person #11 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just a bunch of human turf- fickers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stay back! If you hurt me, my market value will go down, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe I was deceived by you villains....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How naive of Me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: Amatsuki Toki

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just give up already!! There's nothing but ocean behind you!! You've got no way out of this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No, there is a way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is it. I have to leap into the future again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: JWAAAAAAAAAAAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: G'IAAAA!!!!! It's an Unibozu!!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I heard a woman... Bough!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: K’TAAA!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: For help... bought

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Someone happens

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A MON-STER...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Did you... come to help me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oden's gone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn... He only had ten minutes left!! He must've reached his limit...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You were way too harsh, pops!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: silence...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Someone knows I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you'd just have shortened it by an hour...

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Retainers
dialogue.text: Lord Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He would've passed the test!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He was doing so well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The following day

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Phew!! I guess I lost track of whitebeard's ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WH... What an amazing recovery...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: you are human, right...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: what a shame. I thought we would sail to all sorts of countries together...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh well!! At least I finally made it out of Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: woman!! You took care of me when I was unconscious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My adventure starts on this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Thank you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, no, I should be the one thanking you!! You saved me yesterday!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah... I have to admit, it is disappointing that the first person I meet after leaving...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: More importantly, did you just say that you're from Wano?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...is not exactly extically dressed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth is... I have always dreamed of going to Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Please, can you guide me there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You look disgusted!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, where's that monster from yesterday!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the woman, Captain Karma!! We'll leave it to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard Pirates
dialogue.text: Octopoda Pirates CAPTAIN KARMA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that her bodyguard or something!? Well, whatever. We'll just sell them both!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Six arms!! How interesting!! We never had anyone like this back in Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are too many of them!! We should flee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: UWAAA AAAAM!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: It's the Whitebeard Pinterest!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Get on board, Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But I let go of the chain...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You let go of your ambitions for the sake of a woman in need... seems like you're surprisingly soft, huh...?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 52 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
